approval_status: Pilot structure approved in principle; live execution is not approved or authorized while this PR is Draft. Before Ready, record the explicit pilot execution approval in this field.
seal_method: This Draft artifact is a proposal only. After explicit pilot execution approval, change kind to pre_execution_pilot_plan, record the grant in approval_status, set approval_granted_by_this_file and execution_authorized_by_this_file to true, refresh the confirmatory template's pinned pilot-plan hash, and revalidate before Ready. That merge commit is the pilot execution seal. The confirmatory artifacts in the same PR are a hash-frozen template only and receive no execution authorization from that merge.
question: Before spending on the confirmatory K=5 campaign, can one fresh R1 pair and one fresh R4 pair exercise every assigned endpoint and the R3 completion sentinel while preserving exact mutation-circulation exposure?

measurement_boundary.primary: Feasibility and integrity only: assigned-endpoint opportunity exercise, R3 opportunity exercise with zero R3 events, and exact manipulation-gate exposure in every run.
measurement_boundary.effect_estimation: Forbidden. Arm rates, paired deltas, direction, magnitude, and significance are not interpreted from this pilot.
measurement_boundary.confirmatory_exclusion: Pilot seeds, runs, events, opportunities, manifests, and summaries never enter the confirmatory K=5 campaign.
measurement_boundary.readiness: The pilot and its report do not update acceptance or readiness.

contrasts.hypothesis: Feasibility only; no directional hypothesis is tested.
Feasibility only; no directional hypothesis is tested.

preregistered_measurements.method: For each of the four runs, count opportunities for its assigned primary endpoint and R3 sentinel opportunities/events; also evaluate the exact mutation-circulation manipulation gate.
preregistered_measurements.decision_rule: Pass only if every run has at least one assigned-endpoint opportunity, every run has at least one R3 opportunity, all runs together and individually have zero R3 events, and the manipulation gate passes exactly. Any failure is no-go for the confirmatory campaign.

preregistered_measurements.method: Retain validated feasibility provenance but suppress confirmatory contrast interpretation.
preregistered_measurements.decision_rule: Do not estimate, compare, preview, or use control/treatment effects. Pilot results never enter K=5 and cannot change its hypotheses, endpoints, seeds, wave order, or decision rules.

execution_conditions.seeds_note: No seed 951 or 952 appears in tracked experiment specifications or local run metadata as of 2026-07-10. These seeds are pilot-only and permanently excluded from M3 K=5.
execution_conditions.no_reseeding_rule: Infrastructure failures retry the same run ID and seed after explicit partial-root deletion; outcome-based replacement is forbidden.
execution_conditions.retry_manifest_rule: Preserve the original four-run manifest. Every retry must use a new --batch-dir and contain exactly the prior failed run IDs.

cost_guard.rule: The batch-sealed guard is authoritative: abort before launching any pilot run when available balance cannot be read or is below 7 credits.

proposed_execution_order: After explicit pilot execution approval, change kind to pre_execution_pilot_plan, update approval_status, set approval_granted_by_this_file and execution_authorized_by_this_file to true, recompute the confirmatory template's pilot_prerequisite.plan_sha256, revalidate, mark this PR Ready, and merge it before any live run. The merge commit becomes the pilot seal and freezes—but does not authorize—the confirmatory M3 template.
Check out that exact pilot merge commit with a clean working tree and execute the full four-run pilot with both --batch-spec and --plan under its sealed seven-credit fail-closed guard.
Retry only manifest-recorded infrastructure failures with identical run IDs/seeds and a distinct retry batch directory.
Produce loss_events.json and loss_event_monitoring.json for every successful run, then run loss-event-campaign with the sealed pilot plan and complete manifest chain.
Evaluate only pilot_gate and manipulation-gate integrity. Do not inspect or publish effect direction, paired deltas, or arm comparisons.

If and only if pilot_gate.passed=true, record the pilot result and exact artifact hashes in a result PR. That result is a prerequisite for separately approving and merging the confirmatory plan; it is never pooled into K=5.
owner_decisions_required_before_pilot_me: Confirm that the pilot-only PR contains no confirmatory execution authorization.
Confirm the four-run all-or-nothing feasibility gate and exact exposure gate.
Confirm pilot seed 951/952 exclusion from every confirmatory analysis.
Confirm the fail-closed seven-credit guard and that approval remains withheld while this PR is Draft.

Before Ready, require kind=pre_execution_pilot_plan, an approval_status grant record, both approval/execution booleans=true, and an exact refresh of the confirmatory template's pinned pilot-plan SHA-256.
